rationale: The cited paper is used as one example in grouped citations to prior healthy-eating nudge research, including in the contribution framing and theoretical-contributions section. The citing paper does not engage its responsibility-deflection mechanism, build hypotheses from it, or reuse its design/measures; it only positions prior work on physical involvement as part of the broader background. Because the role is contextual literature positioning rather than a distinct functional dependency, this is a passing mention.
